brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Show me only the services that aren't in the catalog. Nothing else.

template.text: logs LEFT JOIN services ON tags.service = service_name

expected.sql: SELECT DISTINCT tags['service'] as service FROM logs LEFT JOIN services ON logs.tags['service'] = service_name WHERE service_name IS NULL

hints.text: Carol: 'That includes the registered services. Filter to those missing from the catalog.'
Carol: 'Zero rows. Flip the condition — I want the ones without a catalog match.'
Carol: 'Query error. Check for a NULL catalog column — service_name IS NULL.'
Carol: 'service_name IS NULL — the anti-join pattern. No match means the catalog column is empty.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text:
chrono-portal-mirror. log-sync-svc.

Two of them. One I've been tracking for three weeks. One I've never seen before today.

log-sync-svc first appeared twenty-nine days ago. It's been calling export-svc and reporting-svc. It's not looking for old documents. It's moving data somewhere.

I don't know where.
